metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_34
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fbxo45 is enriched in synaptic fractions. Fbxo45 immunoreactivity colocalizes with a presynaptic marker, VGlut1, and a postsynaptic marker, PSD-95. Analyses using immunoelectron microscopy revealed expression of Fbxo45 in both pre- and postsynaptic structures of excitatory hippocampal neurons in culture. Experimental description: Fig. 3A/B: immunoblot analysis of Fbxo45 in adult **mice** is shown.
Fig. 3C: "immunocytochemistry of primary cultured **rat** hippocampal neurons expressing Fbxo45 is shown."
Fig. 3D: Immuno-EM on froze brain sections, species not specified explicitly, likely mouse

Personal communication with the first author on the species of the Fig.3D data:

Q: "I would like to use your publication in JBC titled "Fbxo45, a Novel Ubiquitin Ligase, Regulates Synaptic Activity" for annotation of Fbxo45. As a formality have to ask you on the species of the tissue used for the EM pictures used in Fig. 3D."

A: "Dear Dr. Pim van Nierop,

Thank you for asking.
I'm Hirobumi Tada, first author in JBC paper.
We used mouse in the EM study.

Sincerely yours,
Hirobumi Tada"

Mouse species was allowed and selected for annotation.
